title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: Yahoo Finance provides comprehensive analyst coverage and earnings forecasts for BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI). Two analysts cover BBAI with a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $5.50, representing 29.11% upside potential. The analyst price targets range from $5.00 to $6.00, reflecting moderate bullish sentiment despite the company's current unprofitability. Earnings forecasts indicate BigBear.ai is expected to grow earnings by 35.5% and revenue by 11% annually, though the company is forecast to remain unprofitable over the next 3 years. Revenue estimates for the next quarter are $35.61 million with a range of $34.10M to $36.37M. For FY2026, revenue is projected at approximately $145 million, with expectations of $155-170 million in 2027. The analyst consensus reflects cautious optimism around BigBear.ai's defense AI positioning, strong backlog, and margin improvement, though concerns about cash burn and path to profitability persist. Recent earnings announcements show the company has started to beat EPS expectations, with Q1 2026 EPS of -$0.04 exceeding analyst estimates of -$0.08.
